summary: Full-stack tested Munchy's Grill: 11/11 pytest backend cases pass (orders + contact CRUD, validation, sort, 404s, invalid-status 422, no _id leak). Frontend E2E via Playwright: hero loads with exact tagline, glass nav with brand 'M', Menu/Story/Visit, phone, Cart; hero 'Order Now' scrolls to #menu; all 8 categories render; Shnitzel Baguette item modal opens with toppings & sauces (max 2 enforced with toast), special instructions work; Add to cart fires, cart badge increments; bottom-sheet CartSheet opens with line item (options+instructions), qty +/- works; Continue to Checkout opens CheckoutForm; name/phone/ASAP/cash_on_pickup submit shows 'Thanks, TEST. Your order is in. Confirmation #...' success screen; /admin lists the created order and native <select> status change to 'preparing' persists via PATCH; Contact form submits. Zero console errors through the whole flow.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: data-testid='nav-cart-badge' is duplicated in DOM because FlyToCart animates a clone of the nav cart badge, leading to 2 matching elements after an add-to-cart. Not user-facing but can trip Playwright strict-mode selectors. Consider giving the fly-to-cart clone a different testid (e.g. 'fly-to-cart-ghost') and keeping 'nav-cart-badge' unique to the header.
Minor: CheckoutForm/Success screen uses 'Confirmation #<uppercase id prefix>' which is not returned from the backend separately; it is derived from order.id. That's fine but worth documenting.
Nit: /api/orders POST returns 200 OK rather than 201 Created on resource creation. Works, but 201 is more REST-correct.

Nit: backend CORS uses os.environ.get('CORS_ORIGINS', '*').split(',') - if CORS_ORIGINS='*' then allow_credentials=True with '*' origin is a browser-spec violation; prod-only concern (current .env uses '*').
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for orders and contact during backend tests; leftover test rows remain in DB (acceptable for dev).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py, run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is used via frontend/.env loaded in test. For frontend: menu item ids are in /app/frontend/src/data/menu.js; ItemModal side-panel appears on desktop (>=768px) and bottom-sheet on mobile. Note duplicated 'nav-cart-badge' testid due to FlyToCart clone - prefer evaluating JS click or using .first when asserting badge text.
